overall.description: A cinematic first-person sequence from a high-end game engine depicting navigation through a burning traditional Japanese village or castle complex. The player moves steadily through heavy smoke and fire, transitioning from an open burning courtyard into the narrow wooden corridors of collapsing structures, with dramatic lighting from both sunlight and flames.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide burning courtyard surrounded by traditional Japanese architecture. The ground consists of broken wooden platforms with active fires, while smoke fills the air and sunlight streams through from above. The camera moves steadily forward toward the main building structures in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered area beneath the building's roof structure. Wooden beams and charred overhangs dominate the upper frame, while a damaged paper shoji screen is visible on the right. The sky becomes partially obscured as the camera moves deeper under the shelter of the burning architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow burning corridor inside traditional wooden building with broken floor planks

events.description: enters narrow enclosed corridor with burning timbers and collapsing wooden walls

broken wooden planks with small fires and gaps in the flooring

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow enclosed corridor deep within the burning structure. Wooden walls press in from both sides with visible fire damage, while broken floor planks create hazardous footing. Thick wooden pillars and burning debris line the path as the camera progresses through the darkened interior, with no sky visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit burning courtyard into the claustrophobic, darkened depths of a collapsing Japanese structure. It begins by moving steadily across broken wooden platforms amidst active fires and streaming sunlight, heading toward the distant main buildings. As the camera advances, the open sky is gradually obscured by charred overhangs and wooden beams, transitioning into a semi-covered area marked by damaged paper shoji screens. The scene then shifts further inward, moving from the shelter of the roof into a narrow enclosed corridor where wooden walls and thick pillars press in from both sides. Finally, the environment transforms into a darkened interior of burning debris and broken floor planks, completely cutting off the view of the sky.
